ageGate.footerText: Drink responsibly. The sale of alcohol to minors is prohibited.

hero.subtitle: Since 1916 • Teramo, Abruzzo
hero.descriptionLine1: The liquid essence of a harsh and generous land.
hero.descriptionLine2: Tradition, patience, and nature captured in every drop.

filosofia.subtitle: Our essence
filosofia.title: THE EXCELLENCE OF NATURE
filosofia.quote: "We produce liqueurs the old-fashioned way: with the time necessary for the earth to release its deepest secret."

typewriter.text:
> INITIALIZING...
> Maceration: ACTIVE
> Flavors: ZERO DETECTED
> Resting: IN BARRIQUE
> Filtration: ARTISANAL
> STATUS: READY

cards.artisanDesc: Typical Abruzzo recipes produced in small batches. Gentian, Ratafià, Licorice, Poppy, and Amaro.
cards.zeroDesc: Slow maceration of botanicals, resting in oak, and natural filtration. No added flavors.
cards.customDesc: Real customization for weddings. Bottles, labels, and packaging tailored for your event.

step1.title: Natural Selection
step1.desc: Meticulous search for the best herbs and roots in the Gran Sasso National Park. Gentiana Lutea, juniper berries, and wild botanicals are selected and hand-harvested in full respect of seasonal cycles, ensuring the absolute purity of the raw material.

step2.title: Cold Extraction
step2.desc: The heart of our artisanal process: no thermal or chemical forcing. We exclusively apply the technique of cold maceration, a slow and prolonged infusion lasting over 40 days to gently extract the aromatic soul and essential natural properties.

step3.title: Balance & Rest
step3.desc: After strictly artisanal filtration, the liqueur rests and refines in ancient oak barriques to smooth out any roughness. This aging confers softness, stabilizes the flavor over time, and gives that roundness and elegance typical of the Abruzzo tradition.

prodotti.subtitle: The Catalog
prodotti.title: OUR LIQUEURS
prodotti.desc: From Trebbiano d'Abruzzo combined with Gentiana Lutea root, to the softness of Ratafià. Every bottle contains the history of our territory.

items.name: Gentian
items.title: Typical Abruzzo liqueur from Trebbiano and gentian root
items.desc: Gentian is one of the most authentic symbols of the Abruzzo tradition. This liqueur is born from the infusion of Gentiana Lutea root in Trebbiano d'Abruzzo wine, left to mature slowly in oak barriques to develop depth and complexity.
items.ingredienti: Trebbiano d'Abruzzo, alcohol, gentian root, sugar (contains sulfites)
items.degustazione: Elegant bitter profile, with a vinous-aromatic base and a persistent finish. Serve cold (6–10°C), ideal as a digestive or paired with aged cheeses.

items.name: Licorice
items.title: Pure intensity from selected licorice
items.desc: A decisive and enveloping liqueur, obtained from concentrated licorice extracts. Perfect for those looking for a strong and recognizable taste.
items.degustazione: Dense, balsamic, with a balance between sweetness and bitterness. Excellent cold or with ice, also perfect as a strong end-of-meal drink.

items.name: Ratafià
items.title: Abruzzo tradition between wine and fruit
items.desc: Historic liqueur of peasant culture, made with red wine and fruit, according to an artisanal process that values the simplicity of the raw materials.
items.ingredienti: Red wine, fruit (sour cherries/black cherries), sugar, alcohol
items.degustazione: Soft and round, with notes of cherry and almond. Perfect with dry desserts or as a meditation liqueur.

items.name: Poppy
items.title: A taste outside the box
items.desc: An original proposal that combines floral delicacy and artisanal character. Designed for those looking for something different from classic liqueurs.
items.degustazione: Light, aromatic, with floral notes and a soft finish. Serve cold, also ideal as a refined gift idea.

items.name: Herbal Amaro
items.title: Natural digestive from selected herbs
items.desc: A classic amaro reinterpreted in an artisanal key, with a balanced mix of botanicals.
items.degustazione: Herbaceous, slightly spicy, with a clean bitter finish. Serve cold or with ice.

items.name: Arancello
items.title: Natural citrus freshness
items.desc: Liqueur obtained from the infusion of orange peels, expressing all the vivacity of citrus fruits.
items.degustazione: Fresh, fragrant, and slightly bitter. Serve very cold, ideal after meals or as a light aperitif.

items.name: Limoncello
items.title: Timeless classic of the Italian tradition
items.desc: Liqueur obtained from selected lemon peels, processed to keep the aromatic component intact.
items.degustazione: Intense and citrusy, with balanced sweetness. Serve ice-cold, perfect as an end-of-meal drink.

bomboniere.desc: Forget the usual impersonal favors. Create a true sensory journey for your guests, with packaging and formats completely tailored to your event.
features: Exclusive shape designs (square, oval, flat ball)
Labels, tags, and accessories coordinated with the event theme

footer.desc: Traditional Abruzzo liqueurs crafted by hand in Garrano Alto, in the Gran Sasso and Monti della Laga National Park.
footer.warning: Drink responsibly. <br class="md:hidden" /> The sale of alcohol to minors is prohibited.
